case_title: OCHON-ROSALES, LUIS A. VS FRIEDMAN, JON

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, JON HEARING SET FOR AUG-28-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCHON-ROSALES, LUIS A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, JON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, JON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OCHON-ROSALES, LUIS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, JON $275.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $315.00, PLAINTIFF TO ETURN THE COMPUTER EQUIPMENT TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO JOHN FREADMAN RETURNED
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM AUG-28-1997 TO SEP-02-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
CONT. REQUEST FILED BY DEFEND. RECEIVED AND SENT TO COURT.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM SEP-02-1997 TO OCT-07-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $275.00 FILED BY OCHON-ROSALES, LUIS A. AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, JON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-07-1997, GRANTED
